data.title: Russia now holds over $25 billion in crypto
data.description:
Russia’s crypto asset holdings have reportedly blown past 2 trillion rubles, worth more than $25. 4 billion, by June 2025, according to Vasily Girya, CEO of GIS Mining, while speaking at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum (SPIEF 2025). Russian companies are making large mining orders. This means more capital is flowing straight into the infrastructure […]

data.title: A whale address transferred 3.527 million TRUMP to Binance, worth $32.8 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, a whale address (JCGQV) transferred 3.527 million TRUMP tokens to the Binance hot wallet, worth about 32.8 million US dollars. According to transaction information, these tokens were transferred from the Squads Vault address marked as suspected Official TRUMP Meme to the whale address (JCGQV) about ten minutes ago.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Breakdown Spurs Sell-Offs, Analyst Reveals What Will Happen If BTC Hits 92,800
data.description:
The Bitcoin price crashed from as high as $106,000 to $102,000 on June 20, sparking sell-offs among investors. Now, crypto analyst Colin has indicated that the flagship crypto could still drop to as low as $92,800 and revealed what will happen if BTC gets there. The Current Bitcoin Price Action And What To Expect In an X post, Colin said that it looks increasingly likely that the Bitcoin price will see a retest of at least 100,800 as the first major level of support. The analyst made this statement as BTC dropped out of a bullish pennant for a second time
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/if-bitcoin-hits-92800/

data.title: Ethereum Staking Surges Despite Market Slump, Locking Over 28% of Supply
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethereum-staking-surges-despite-market-slump-locking-over-28-of-supply/

data.title: Companies Are Racing to Build Bitcoin Treasuries
data.description:
Over the past year, firms across different industries have ramped up bitcoin buying, amassing about $87 billion in corporate holdings—nearly a third of all future bitcoin supply.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/companies-are-racing-to-build-bitcoin-treasuries

data.title: Bitcoin's market value is greater than the combined market value of Bank of America and Bank of China
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Watcher.Guru’s post on the X platform, the market value of Bitcoin is higher than the combined market value of two financial institutions, Bank of America and Bank of China. According to the latest data from 8MarketCap, the current market value of Bitcoin is about 2.061 trillion US dollars, the market value of Bank of America is about 342.7 billion US dollars, and the market value of Bank of China is about 234.06 billion US dollars.

data.title: Polyhedra Vows Buybacks After ZKJ Token Crashes in Alleged Attack
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, June 21, 2025- Polyhedra Network co-founder Tiancheng Xie on Monday said the company would initiate more token buybacks after its ZKJ token plunged nearly 85% in hours due to what it described as a “coordinated financial attack. ” The ZKJ token, which had traded near $2, fell sharply to around 30 cents on Sunday. […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/polyhedra-vows-buybacks-after-zkj-token-crashes-in-alleged-attack
